about.name: Agung Kurniawan
about.title: Hi, I'M
about.summary: a web developer with a focus on front-end development. I'm currently building my career by creating modern web applications and continuously improving my skills. My goal is to craft intuitive, accessible, and visually engaging user experiences.
about.goal: I aspire to build a career where I can bring my ideas to life through engaging, well-designed web applications.

experience.title: I've been building web applications for over one year now, and I'm always eager to learn more.

items.title: Front-end
items.text: Turning ideas into interactive and well-structured web applications, that deliver seamless user experiences.

items.title: Backend
items.text: Familiar with backend fundamentals and continuously improving to better support full-stack development.

items.title: Cloud
items.text: Experienced with basic cloud deployment and eager to deepen my expertise.

items.title: Utilities
items.text: I use a range of tools to support editing, documentation, and mockup creation.

environtment.title: TypeScript
environtment.summary: I am proficient in TypeScript, whether I'm working with React or Node.js, using it to build scalable, maintainable, and type-safe applications.

environtment.title: Arch Linux
environtment.summary: Comfortable working in Linux environments, with Arch Linux as my primary operating system for daily development.
